textPlain: Brilliant!While reading I remembered "Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy" where the whole world is a computer and everything in on Earth happened to a random person have a sudden insight about the meaning of life.My two cents: I think computation is a bedrock concept in the universe, idk about the extent of this importance but it's something that was "discovered" and not "invented"
